# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Performance and Nano Server support**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 ships performance improvements and adds FreeType font support for Windows Nano Server. A native memory leak in the SKImage raster path is fixed, hot paths in GetEncodedText and SKRuntimeEffectUniforms are now faster, and a community contribution enables FreeType-based font rendering on Windows Nano Server.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **Native memory leak fixed in SKImage raster creation failure path** — A CoTaskMem pixel buffer allocated during SKImage.Create was not freed when the raster image creation failed, causing a native memory leak. The failure path now correctly releases the buffer. ([#4455](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4455))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Allocation-free GetEncodedText for null-terminated strings** — GetEncodedText no longer allocates an intermediate string when converting null-terminated encoded text, reducing managed heap pressure on text-heavy rendering paths. ([#4498](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4498))
- **SKRuntimeEffectUniforms lookup map pre-sized to avoid rehashing** — The uniform lookup map in SKRuntimeEffectUniforms is now pre-sized to the known uniform count at construction time, eliminating dictionary rehashing overhead when effects have many uniforms. ([#4512](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4512))

## Platform

- **FreeType font support for Windows Nano Server** — SkiaSharp now uses FreeType on Windows Nano Server, enabling font rendering in environments where DirectWrite is unavailable — such as minimal container images. — ❤️ [@jeffska](https://github.com/jeffska) ([#4280](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4280))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@jeffska](https://github.com/jeffska) | Added FreeType-based font support for Windows Nano Server, enabling SkiaSharp to render text in minimal Windows container environments ([#4280](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4280)) |
